creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
External plugins for Tkabber.

WWW: http://tkabber.jabber.ru/tkabber-plugins

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99

Please make a repocopy of net-im/tkabber-plugins to
net-im/tkabber-plugins-devel before. Later I'll change MAINTAINER of
net-im/tkabber-plugins to MAINTAINER of net-im/tkabber by his request.
